identity.client_raw: Government of Akwa Ibom State, Ministry of Special Duties
identity.project_name: CONSTRUCTION OF PROPOSED CONCRETE APRON FOR THE NEW TERMINAL BUILDING AT VICTOR ATTAH INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT UYO, AKWA IBOM STATE

rows.description: Allow for mobilization of contractor's equipment and personel to site including demobilization
Allow for Pavement testing, soil investigation and other laboratory testings
Allow for provision of work safety plan, manual and processing of NCAA Approval including training of project team members on safety requirements according to ICAO standards
Allow for services for the Engineer's Representatives
Allow for provision of equipment, labour and assistance as may be required by Engineer's Represntative
Allow for insurance of work, equipment including security
Allow for provision of project vehicle, maintenance and running cost
Allow for removal and relocation of existing services.
Allow for site meetings and preparations
Clear site on either side of centre line of the proposed Apron up to the limit of construction width of all bushes, shrubs, grasses & trees
Removal of top soil to a depth not exceeding 500mm
Excavation for cuttings, material other than top soil, rock or artificial hard material, depth not exceeding 6m

Excavate from approved borrow-pits, haul excavated materials any distance, deposit spread in 150mm layers and compact to 100% B. S compaction as filling for embankment and margin, shape formation and trim slopes to required cross section
Scarify and pulverize existing bituminous surface, shape and compact to 100% B. S compaction as improved sub-base.
Dub in grass to slopes of embankment as specified and directed rate to include top-soil 100mm thick.
Provide and lay 100mm concrete slope protection to high embankment with BRC wire mesh.
Clean and desilt culverts, side drains as directed.
Excavate, Pulverise, lay and compact to shape, mixture of sharp sand and fill material at subgrade to a depth of 200mm
Provide and install 200mm High Density Pressure pipes for underground drainage
Provide and install 6 ways 150mm duct line for services, Rate to include Excavation, Blindind Casing and Pipe supply and installation
Excavate for culvert and concrete line drain to any depth including backfilling to 100% B. S compaction and dispose of surplus materials as directed
Provide, mix and place concrete grade 30 in box culverts as specified inclusive of blinding & formwork. ( reinforcement measured seperately )
Provide, mix and place concrete grade 40 in box culverts as specified inclusive of blinding & formwork. ( reinforcement measured seperately )
Provide and fix H.T. Reinforcement in box culverts, headwalls, wingwalls, aprons and toe beams.
Provide Concrete Lined drains 1.04 m x 0.83 m as specified and directed (Grade 30 concrete), Volume = 0.7525m3/m Rate to include blinding, shuttering and reinforcement
Provide Concrete Lined drains 1.2 m x 1.0 m as specified and directed (Grade 30 concrete), Volume = 0.525m3/m Rate to include shuttering and reinforcement
Provide and lay 750mm diameter prcecast concrete pipes for underground storm water drainage Rate to include 150mm sharp sand bedding, concrete surround, shuttering and reinforcement
Provide and install reinforced concrete chambers 1027mm x 650 mm internal width, 0.23m thick wall and fitted with 75mm x 75mm angle iron for cast iron grattings seating
Provide and install reinforced concrete chambers 1027mm x 650 mm internal width, 0.23m thick wall and fitted with 75mm x 75mm angle iron for cast iron grattings seating
Provide and install cast iron grattings CHA 002 1027mm x 650mm manufactured by Nigerian Foundries according to BS EN 124 : 2015 international standard and test load 600KN
Provide and install cast iron grattings CHA 002 1027mm x 650mm manufactured by Nigerian Foundries according to BS EN 124 : 2015 international standard and test load 600KN
Provide and place G30 Concrete in Access Slabs and Cover to Drains
Provide and fix H.T. Reinforcement in Cover Slab to drain
Breaking of reinforced concrete manhole on the existing culvert, to be rebuilt to a smaller size of 1027mm x 650mm and reconstruction to be charged under bill nr 3.02
Shape and compact formation in cutting to 100% B.S. compaction for the apron, fillets, transition areas and the shoulders

Provide, spread, haul any distance, shape and compact approved crushed rock (wet or dry) in base of Apron, fillets, transition areas and shoulders as specified to a compacted thickness of 250mm of (Haulage inclusive)
Provide and lay insitu dry lean concrete grade 15, 150mm thick in the apron, fillets and transition areas between the apron and taxiway, as may be directed.
Provide and install insitu concrete grade 40, 400mm thick in Apron, fillet and transition areas, as may be directed.
Provide and install insitu concrete grade 30, 200mm thick in the Apron shoulders, as may be directed.

Provide and install 5.0m by 4.7 m Y8mm Mat, (0.096 ton/mat) bars to be spaced at 200mm centres bothways and installed at 50mm below the finished face of concrete in apron, fillets and transition areas as norminal reinforcement

Provide and install 5.0m by 4.45 m Y8mm Mat, (0.091 ton/mat) bars to be spaced at 200mm centres bothways and installed at 50mm below the finished face of concrete in apron, fillets and transition areas as norminal reinforcement

Provide and install 4.20m by 4.80 m Y8mm Mat, (0.0832 ton/mat) bars to be spaced at 200mm centres bothways and installed at 50mm below the finished face of concrete in apron, fillets and transition areas as norminal reinforcement

Provide and install 4.7m by 4.7 m Y8mm Mat, (0.089 ton/mat) bars to be spaced at 200mm centres bothways and installed at 50mm below the finished face of concrete in apron, fillets and transition areas as norminal reinforcement

Provide and install 4.5m by 4.8 m Y8mm Mat, (0.088 ton/mat) bars to be spaced at 200mm centres bothways and installed at 50mm below the finished face of concrete in apron, fillets and transition areas as norminal reinforcement
Provide and install 3.45m by 4.2m Y8mm Mat, (0.06 ton/mat) bars to be spaced at 200mm centres bothways and installed at 50mm below the finished face of concrete shoulder as norminal reinforcement
Provide, paint with bitumen and install dowel bars 32mm diameter 600mm length 350mm centers at transverse contraction and longitudinal construction joints .

Provide and fix 20mm thick premolded joint filler board at isolation joints including provision of separation tape or backer rod and seal with self leveling silicone sealant dow coring 890 sl or approved equal
Provide and install 16 mm diameter ribbed bar as 780mm length and 780mm centers at longitudinal joint on the apron shoulders

Provide longitudinal construction joints depth 400mm on apron and apron transition areas, paint first face of pilot bays with bitumen in compliance with BS 434, instal backer rod and seal joints with self leveling silicone sealant dow coring 890 sl or approved equal

Provide longitudinal construction joints depth 200mm on apron and apron shoulder, paint first face of pilot bays with bitumen in compliance with BS 434, instal backer rod and seal joints with self leveling silicone sealant dow coring 890 sl or approved equal

Provide transverse contraction joints 400mm depth on apron and apron transition areas, saw cut joints, instal backer rod and seal joints with self leveling silicone sealant dow coring 890 sl or approved equal
Provide transverse contraction joints 200mm depth on apron shoulder, saw cut joints, instal backer rod and seal joints with self leveling silicone sealant dow coring 890 sl or approved equal
Taxiway Center Line Markings + lead in
Taxiway Center Line Lights g/y inset
Taxiway Center Line Lights g/g inset
Primary Power Cables 5KVA - to switch room
PVC Pipes for Secondary Power Cable ducts
4- way cable duct for primary power cables
6- way cable duct for primary power cables
Electrical Service Pits and Manholes - with Cover
Integration of new taxiway in tower remote control system
Design of the Airfield Lighting System
A1 Fuel Tanks - 100,000 liter each - DIN 6608/2
Fuel Pipes from fuel depot to aircraft stands
Power Pits 45kva to 180kva - ground flushing Maxium output power 2,500 Amps / 400 Hz
Power Cables from Main Supply to Pits
4 - way ducts for remote parking stands

rows.department: Engr, Survey, civil store & Batching plant

reference.item: Bill of Quanties for Design Mix of concrete

reference.detail: This is for excavation works carried out solely by the subcontractor. It is not applicable to their attendance on PW excavator.
Rates include, excavation, backfilling & compaction, supply of all labour and materials
Rates include, excavation, backfilling & compaction, supply of all labour and materials
Rates include, excavation, backfilling & compaction, supply of all labour and materials
Rates include, excavation, backfilling & compaction, supply of all labour and materials

Rate includes, assembling / striking / cleaning moulds, fixing rebar, pouring concrete, curing concrete, removing units from moulds, stacking precast units and all other handling required in precast yard other than loading onto flatbed

This is specifically for loading the precast units onto the flatbed in the precast yard and offloading at site. This should be paid for once only. All other handling of precast units in the precast yard is covered under casting drain units
Rate includes laying both roadside and kerbside units. Fixing rebar and placing concrete in gap to be stitched.

Rate includes, assembling / striking / cleaning moulds, fixing rebar, pouring concrete, curing concrete, removing units from moulds, stacking precast units and all other handling required in precast yard
Rates include, excavation, backfilling & compaction, supply of all labour and materials
Rates include, excavation, backfilling & compaction, supply of all labour and materials
Rates include, excavation, backfilling & compaction, supply of all labour and materials
Rates include, excavation, backfilling & compaction, supply of all labour and materials

Rate is for all labour required to operate static batching plant in precast yard provided by PW, includes handling of all raw materials and loading concrete onto mixer trucks. PW to provide all materials, payloader for loading aggregates, water tanker if necessary for water.
Rate is for placing, vibrating and finishing concrete within formwork containing reinforcement bars already fixed in place

Rate includes, assembling / striking / cleaning moulds, fixing rebar, pouring concrete, curing concrete, removing units from moulds, stacking precast units and all other handling required in precast yard

Rate includes, assembling / striking / cleaning moulds, fixing rebar, pouring concrete, curing concrete, removing units from moulds, stacking precast units and all other handling required in precast yard
